What is the total payment value for orders with more than one installment?

SELECT

failed_queries.question: Find the top 3 sellers by total revenue in each state

detailed_results.question: What is the total number of customers in the state of Rio de Janeiro?
detailed_results.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(CUSTOMER_ID) FROM RAW.CUSTOMERS WHERE CUSTOMER_STATE = 'RJ'
detailed_results.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CUSTOMER_UNIQUE_ID) 
FROM ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.CUSTOMERS 
WHERE CUSTOMER_STATE = 'Rio de Janeiro'

detailed_results.question: What is the average price of products in the 'cama_mesa_banho' category?
detailed_results.expected_sql: SELECT AVG(PRICE) FROM RAW.ORDER_ITEMS WHERE PRODUCT_ID IN (SELECT PRODUCT_ID FROM RAW.PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCT_CATEGORY_NAME = 'cama_mesa_banho')
detailed_results.generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(oi.PRICE) AS AVG_PRICE
FROM ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_ITEMS oi
JOIN ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.PRODUCTS p ON oi.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID
JOIN ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_TRANSLATION pct ON p.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_NAME = pct.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_NAME
WHERE pct.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_NAME = 'cama_mesa_banho'

detailed_results.question: What is the total freight value for orders delivered in 2018?
detailed_results.expected_sql: SELECT SUM(FREIGHT_VALUE) FROM RAW.ORDER_ITEMS WHERE ORDER_ID IN (SELECT ORDER_ID FROM RAW.ORDERS WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ORDER_DELIVERED_CUSTOMER_DATE) = 2018)
detailed_results.generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_ITEMS.FREIGHT_VALUE) AS total_freight_value
FROM ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_ITEMS
JOIN ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS ON ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_ITEMS.ORDER_ID = ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_ID
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_DELIVERED_CUSTOMER_DATE) = 2018

detailed_results.question: What is the average order value (price + freight) by customer city and state?
detailed_results.expected_sql: SELECT AVG(T1.PRICE + T1.FREIGHT_VALUE) AS AVG_ORDER_VALUE, T2.CUSTOMER_CITY, T2.CUSTOMER_STATE FROM RAW.ORDER_ITEMS T1 INNER JOIN RAW.ORDERS T3 ON T1.ORDER_ID = T3.ORDER_ID INNER JOIN RAW.CUSTOMERS T2 ON T3.CUSTOMER_ID = T2.CUSTOMER_ID GROUP BY T2.CUSTOMER_CITY, T2.CUSTOMER_STATE ORDER BY AVG_ORDER_VALUE DESC
detailed_results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
 c.CUSTOMER_CITY,
 c.CUSTOMER_STATE,
 AVG(oi.PRICE + oi.FREIGHT_VALUE) AS AVG_ORDER_VALUE
FROM 
 ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.CUSTOMERS c
JOIN 
 ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS o ON c.CUSTOMER_ID = o.CUSTOMER_ID
JOIN 
 ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_ITEMS oi ON o.ORDER_ID = oi.ORDER_ID
GROUP BY 
 c.CUSTOMER_CITY, c.CUSTOMER_STATE

detailed_results.question: Which product categories have the highest average review scores?
detailed_results.expected_sql: SELECT T1.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_NAME, AVG(T2.REVIEW_SCORE) AS AVG_REVIEW_SCORE FROM RAW.PRODUCTS T1 INNER JOIN RAW.ORDER_ITEMS T3 ON T1.PRODUCT_ID = T3.PRODUCT_ID INNER JOIN RAW.ORDER_REVIEWS T2 ON T3.ORDER_ID = T2.ORDER_ID GROUP BY T1.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_NAME ORDER BY AVG_REVIEW_SCORE DESC LIMIT 10
detailed_results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
 ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_TRANSLATION.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_NAME, 
 AVG(ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_REVIEWS.REVIEW_SCORE) AS AVG_REVIEW_SCORE
FROM 
 ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_REVIEWS
JOIN 
 ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_ITEMS ON ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_REVIEWS.ORDER_ID = ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_ITEMS.ORDER_ID
JOIN 
 ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.PRODUCTS ON ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_ITEMS.PRODUCT_ID = ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID
JOIN 
 ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_TRANSLATION ON ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_NAME = ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_TRANSLATION.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_NAME
GROUP BY 
 ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_TRANSLATION.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_NAME
ORDER BY 
 AVG_REVIEW_SCORE DESC
LIMIT 20

detailed_results.question: What is the total revenue (price + freight) by seller city and state?
detailed_results.expected_sql: SELECT SUM(T1.PRICE + T1.FREIGHT_VALUE) AS TOTAL_REVENUE, T2.SELLER_CITY, T2.SELLER_STATE FROM RAW.ORDER_ITEMS T1 INNER JOIN RAW.SELLERS T2 ON T1.SELLER_ID = T2.SELLER_ID GROUP BY T2.SELLER_CITY, T2.SELLER_STATE ORDER BY TOTAL_REVENUE DESC
detailed_results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
 ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.SELLERS.SELLER_CITY,
 ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.SELLERS.SELLER_STATE,
 SUM(ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_ITEMS.PRICE + ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_ITEMS.FREIGHT_VALUE) AS TOTAL_REVENUE
FROM 
 ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.SELLERS
JOIN 
 ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_ITEMS ON ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.SELLERS.SELLER_ID = ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_ITEMS.SELLER_ID
GROUP BY 
 ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.SELLERS.SELLER_CITY, ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.SELLERS.SELLER_STATE

detailed_results.question: What percentage of orders were delivered on time by month?
detailed_results.expected_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ORDER_DELIVERED_CUSTOMER_DATE) AS MONTH, COUNT(CASE WHEN ORDER_DELIVERED_CUSTOMER_DATE <= ORDER_ESTIMATED_DELIVERY_DATE THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS ON_TIME_DELIVERY_RATE FROM RAW.ORDERS GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ORDER_DELIVERED_CUSTOMER_DATE) ORDER BY MONTH
detailed_results.generated_sql:
WITH monthly_delivered AS (
 SELECT 
 DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_PURCHASE_TIMESTAMP) AS MONTH,
 COUNT(CASE WHEN ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_DELIVERED_CUSTOMER_DATE <= ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_ESTIMATED_DELIVERY_DATE THEN ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_ID END) AS DELIVERED_ON_TIME,
 COUNT(ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_ID) AS TOTAL_ORDERS
 FROM ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS
 GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_PURCHASE_TIMESTAMP)
)
SELECT 
 MONTH,
 (DELIVERED_ON_TIME / NULLIF(TOTAL_ORDERS, 0)) * 100 AS PERCENTAGE_DELIVERED_ON_TIME
FROM monthly_delivered

detailed_results.question: Which customers have placed the most orders?
detailed_results.expected_sql: SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, COUNT(ORDER_ID) AS ORDER_COUNT FROM RAW.ORDERS GROUP BY CUSTOMER_ID ORDER BY ORDER_COUNT DESC LIMIT 10
detailed_results.generated_sql:
SELECT c.CUSTOMER_UNIQUE_ID, COUNT(o.ORDER_ID) AS order_count
FROM ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS o
JOIN ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.CUSTOMERS c ON o.CUSTOMER_ID = c.CUSTOMER_ID
GROUP BY c.CUSTOMER_UNIQUE_ID
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 20

detailed_results.question: What percentage of orders were delivered on time by month?
detailed_results.expected_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ORDER_DELIVERED_CUSTOMER_DATE) AS MONTH, COUNT(CASE WHEN ORDER_DELIVERED_CUSTOMER_DATE <= ORDER_ESTIMATED_DELIVERY_DATE THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS ON_TIME_DELIVERY_RATE FROM RAW.ORDERS GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ORDER_DELIVERED_CUSTOMER_DATE) ORDER BY MONTH
detailed_results.generated_sql:
WITH monthly_delivered AS (
 SELECT 
 DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_PURCHASE_TIMESTAMP) AS MONTH,
 COUNT(CASE WHEN ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_DELIVERED_CUSTOMER_DATE <= ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_ESTIMATED_DELIVERY_DATE THEN ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_ID END) AS DELIVERED_ON_TIME,
 COUNT(ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_ID) AS TOTAL_ORDERS
 FROM ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS
 GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_PURCHASE_TIMESTAMP)
)
SELECT 
 MONTH,
 (DELIVERED_ON_TIME / NULLIF(TOTAL_ORDERS, 0)) * 100 AS PERCENTAGE_DELIVERED_ON_TIME
FROM monthly_delivered

detailed_results.expected_sql: WITH monthly_payments AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', T2.ORDER_PURCHASE_TIMESTAMP) AS MONTH, SUM(T1.PAYMENT_VALUE) AS TOTAL_PAYMENTS FROM RAW.ORDER_PAYMENTS T1 INNER JOIN RAW.ORDERS T2 ON T1.ORDER_ID = T2.ORDER_ID GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', T2.ORDER_PURCHASE_TIMESTAMP)) SELECT MONTH, TOTAL_PAYMENTS, LAG(TOTAL_PAYMENTS) OVER (ORDER BY MONTH) AS PREV_MONTH_PAYMENTS, (TOTAL_PAYMENTS - LAG(TOTAL_PAYMENTS) OVER (ORDER BY MONTH)) / NULLIF(LAG(TOTAL_PAYMENTS) OVER (ORDER BY MONTH), 0) AS GROWTH_RATE FROM monthly_payments ORDER BY MONTH
detailed_results.generated_sql:

 SELECT
 DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_PURCHASE_TIMESTAMP) AS MONTH,
 SUM(ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_PAYMENTS.PAYMENT_VALUE) AS TOTAL_PAYMENT
 FROM ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_PAYMENTS
 JOIN ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS ON ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDER_PAYMENTS.ORDER_ID = ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_ID
 GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', ANALYTICS_COPILOT.RAW.ORDERS.ORDER_PURCHASE_TIMESTAMP)
)
SELECT
 MONTH,
 TOTAL_PAYMENT,
 LAG(TOTAL_PAYMENT) OVER (ORDER BY MONTH) AS PREV_MONTH_PAYMENT,
 (TOTAL_PAYMENT - LAG(TOTAL_PAYMENT) OVER (ORDER BY MONTH)) / NULLIF(LAG(TOTAL_PAYMENT) OVER (ORDER BY MONTH), 0) AS GROWTH_RATE
FROM monthly_totals
ORDER BY MONTH
